'''Kaz Lo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] who made his living as a [[tech specialist]] during the last years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. His first name, ''Kaz'', meant "clever" or "innovative" in the [[Zabraki/Legends|Zabraki language]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Revised Core Rulebook]]'' (May [[2002]]) was the first source to mention Kaz Lo. Likewise, the ''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'' (April [[2003]]) says that Kaz Lo is a [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]].

*<!-- 2002-05-XX -->''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Revised Core Rulebook]]''
